screenSummary.playArea: The play area shows a man who moves along a one-dimensional track between two walls. His position, velocity, and acceleration can be controlled and visualized.
screenSummary.controlArea: The controls set the man's position, velocity, and acceleration or choose a preset motion, toggle the walls, and play, pause, record, or replay the motion. A Reset All button returns the simulation to its starting state.
screenSummary.interactionHint: Set the man's position, velocity, or acceleration and play the simulation to watch him move.

a11y.currentDetails: The man is at position {{position}} meters, moving at {{velocity}} meters per second with an acceleration of {{acceleration}} meters per second squared. Playback is {{state}}.
